fault_hypothesis: The condition to apply clamping is inverted. The code clamps the result when `clamp` is `False` instead of when it is `True`, due to the `if not clamp:` check on line 66.

constraints.intent: The raw interpolated value must be within the anchor y-bounds for the buggy logic to produce a correct result.
When the code incorrectly skips clamping (clamp=True), the result is only correct if the value was already within bounds.
When the code incorrectly applies clamping (clamp=False), the value of y should not have been modified.
